title: Mandala Market Co-op
prompt: An internal produce-flow dashboard for a farmers' co-op in the Kathmandu valley: today's intake by farm, cold-store levels, orders going out, price board. Used every morning by staff on a shared laptop.

direction.name: Living Co-op Ledger
direction.thesis: A crisp cooperative ledger brought alive—dense modular operations, monospaced clarity, and green signals that make the morning flow legible in seconds.
direction.signature: A live flow rail ties counting totals, self-drawing sparklines, and a gently appending intake feed into one visible morning rhythm.
